name: Low-Fat Chicken-Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large saucepan, combine flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Stir in chicken broth and skim milk, cooking over low heat until the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
4. Bring to a boil and stir for one minute.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (cooked rice, chicken breasts, mushrooms, and green bell pepper) to the saucepan.
6. Transfer the mixture to an ungreased baking dish (10x6x1.5 inches or 1 1/2-quart casserole).
7. Bake uncovered for 40 to 45 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
